title: Kebra Nagast: Menelik and the Covenant
description: Menelik, son of Solomon and Sheba, brings the Ark of the Covenant to Ethiopia — the transfer of divine election.
introduction: Menelik, son of Solomon and Sheba, brings the Ark of the Covenant to Ethiopia — the transfer of divine election.

translation.text: And Menelik, son of Solomon, took the Ark of the Covenant from the house of the Lord.
